flask 2.3.2 A simple framework for building complex web applications.
├── blinker >=1.6.2
├── click >=8.1.3
│   └── colorama *
├── itsdangerous >=2.1.2
├── jinja2 >=3.1.2
│   └── markupsafe >=2.0
└── werkzeug >=2.3.3
    └── markupsafe >=2.1.1
blinker 1.7.0 Fast, simple object-to-object and broadcast signaling
click 8.1.7 Composable command line interface toolkit
└── colorama *
colorama 0.4.6 Cross-platform colored terminal text.
itsdangerous 2.1.2 Safely pass data to untrusted environments and back.
jinja2 3.1.2 A very fast and expressive template engine.
└── markupsafe >=2.0
markupsafe 2.1.3 Safely add untrusted strings to HTML/XML markup.
werkzeug 2.3.7 The comprehensive WSGI web application library.
└── markupsafe >=2.1.1
